title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to System Integration: Definition, Need of System
integration, System integration vs. data integration, System integration
challenges, System integration types and examples, Ways to connect
systems, How to approach system integration, Deployment options for
integrated systems,

title: Module 2
content:
Preparation for the Integration Architecture Design: Integration
Architecture Design Process, Business Need Analysis, Functional and Non-
Functional Requirements Analysis, Business Processes Analysis,

title: Module 3
content:
Architecture design: Elements of an Architecture Design, Creating an
Architecture Design, Hardware And Software Specification, Applying The
Concepts At Tune Source

title: Module 4
content:
Program Design: Introduction, Moving from Logical to Physical Process
Models, Designing Programs, Structure Chart, Program Specification.
